About

The editor
behind the work

I'm Deepanshi, a content editor with 5+ years of experience working across B2B, SaaS, academic, technical, and publishing content.

I started out writing. That background matters because I don't just fix what's broken. I understand how content is built, which means I know exactly where it can go wrong and how to put it right.

Over the years I've edited everything from books and research articles to SEO blogs, legal documents, and social media copy. If there are words in it, I can make them better.

What I care about most is preserving your voice while improving your content. Good editing should be invisible. You shouldn't be able to tell where the writer ended and the editor began.

What I Do

Services

01
Structural & Developmental Editing
Your ideas are there but the structure isn't holding them together. I look at the big picture: flow, organisation, coherence, and whether the content is actually doing what it's supposed to do.
02
Book & Long-Form Editing
Long-form content needs a different kind of attention. I work through manuscripts, reports, and extended pieces chapter by chapter, ensuring consistency, continuity, and clarity across the entire document.
03
Line Editing, Copyediting & Brand Voice
Sentence by sentence, I refine clarity, tone, and readability while keeping your voice intact. For brands with an established voice, I edit to fit it precisely so every piece sounds unmistakably like you.
04
Style Guide Compliance
Every publication house, academic journal, and content brand has its own rules. Whether it's APA, MLA, Chicago, or a client-specific house style, I work within established standards precisely and consistently so your content meets the requirements it needs to meet, every time.
05
Proofreading & Final Polish
The last set of eyes before something goes live. Grammar, punctuation, consistency, formatting. Nothing slips through.
06
Ghostwriting
You have the ideas and the expertise. I have the words. I write in your voice so the content sounds exactly like you, only better structured and more clearly expressed.
07
Rewriting
Existing content that isn't working the way it should. I restructure and refresh it without losing what made it good in the first place.
08
Repurposing
Good content deserves more than one life. I take your existing pieces and adapt them for different platforms, turning a long-form blog into a LinkedIn post, a report into a newsletter, or an article into a content series.
Case Studies

Selected Work

Project 01
Scaling Cloud FinOps: Proven Strategies to Accelerate Financial Success
Business / FinTech Book  ·  Developmental Editing, Structural Editing, Proofreading
Book Editing
The Challenge
The manuscript had strong technical foundations but read as a collection of ideas rather than a cohesive book. Chapters overlapped, transitions were absent, and the tone shifted inconsistently, making it difficult for a reader to follow the author's thinking from one section to the next.
What I Changed
  • Rebuilt the chapter sequence to create a logical narrative arc from concept to conclusion.
  • Consolidated overlapping sections and cut repetition that diluted the core arguments.
  • Wrote connecting tissue between chapters so ideas flowed rather than jumped.
  • Standardised tone, voice, and language style across the full manuscript while preserving the author's intent.
  • Proofread for grammar, punctuation, and formatting consistency throughout.
The Result
A structurally sound, publication-ready manuscript that reads as a single cohesive work, with the author's expertise and voice intact throughout. Published by Apress.
Acknowledgment from the Author
View Book on Google Books →
Project 02
Medical Book  ·  800+ Pages
Academic Content  ·  Developmental Editing, Proofreading, Style Guide Compliance
Long-Form Editing
The Challenge
A practising doctor had written a comprehensive medical manuscript for submission to a prestigious publishing house. The clinical knowledge was thorough but the manuscript was not yet ready to meet the publisher's editorial and formatting standards.
What I Changed
  • Applied the publisher's style guide consistently across the full 800+ page document.
  • Corrected grammar, punctuation, and sentence construction without altering clinical meaning.
  • Restructured paragraphs for readability, making dense medical content more navigable.
  • Standardised headings, spacing, and layout so the document read as a unified whole.
  • Conducted a full consistency review across chapters before submission.
The Result
A professionally presented, submission-ready manuscript that met the publisher's formatting and editorial requirements, with improved readability that made the clinical content more accessible without compromising accuracy.
Before Editing
After Editing
Project 03
Blog Content for a Client Website
SEO Long-Form Blogs  ·  Content Editing, SEO Optimisation
Blog Editing
The Challenge
The client had consistent blog output but the content wasn't holding readers. Articles were being produced but not consumed. The writing needed editorial work to turn existing content into something people would actually read through and engage with.
What I Changed
  • Broke dense paragraphs into scannable sections and restructured articles for readability.
  • Rewrote and added headings to improve navigation and on-page SEO structure.
  • Corrected factual inconsistencies and sharpened content clarity throughout.
  • Aligned keyword placement and content structure with search intent.
  • Standardised tone and formatting across the full set of articles for consistency.
The Result
The revised content was more readable, better structured, and aligned with how the target audience was actually searching. Engagement and traction improved measurably within the first reporting period, as shown in the metrics below.
Traffic Metrics  ·  Client name withheld for confidentiality
